global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and bold text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with a flexible cancellation policy.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are centered in the ad, both in a lighter shade of purple, creating a modern and abstract look.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A prominent rectangular shape in the center, slightly tilted, with a soft edge, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned near the bottom left of the main subject, enhancing the geometric theme.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime', positioned centrally for emphasis.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'PulsePlay' in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Book now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern abstract with bold text, Binge starts now, PulsePlay logo, Book now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned with the main subject, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, PulsePlay, Book now, UGC
